  • Method Details

    • loadOnce

      public static void loadOnce(String url, TeaVmScriptLoader.Ok onOk, TeaVmScriptLoader.Err onErr)
      Loads a JS file once. Multiple concurrent calls are coalesced. The state is stored on window.

    • getRaw

      public static org.teavm.jso.JSObject getRaw(String namespace, String path)

    • joinLines

      public static String joinLines(org.teavm.jso.JSObject lines)

    • loadOnceSync

      public static void loadOnceSync(String url)
      Loads a script synchronously. Blocks until the script is loaded. MUST be called from a TeaVM thread context (not from native JS).
